english translation text:
MERE GHAZI KAHAN HOWHERE ARE YOU MY GHAZI (ABBAS a.s)?English Transliteration
Mere Ghazi Kahan Ho - Where are you my Abbas

WHERE ARE YOU MY GHAZI (ABBAS a.s.)?
Mere Ghazi Kahan Ho - Where are you my Abbas

urdu transliteration text:
Teri Jageer Se, Chal Para Kaafla, Mere Ghazi Kahaan Ho
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
OUR GROUP IS LEAVING FROM YOUR AREA,
WHERE ARE YOU MY GHAZI (ABBAS)?
Mere Ghazi Kahan Ho - Where are you my Abbas

urdu transliteration text:
Ay Mere Bawafa, Hai Bahan Berida, Mere Ghazi Kahaan Ho
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
OH MY FAITHFUL ONE, YOUR SISTER IS WITHOUT VEIL,
WHERE ARE YOU MY GHAZI (ABBAS)?
Mere Ghazi Kahan Ho - Where are you my Abbas

urdu transliteration text:
Tujhko Dekhe Bina, Chayn Ata Nahi
Noke Neza Pe Sar Tera Milta Nahi
Me Ziyarat Karun, Kistarha Ye Bataa
I CANNOT REST WITHOUT SEEING YOU,
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
YOUR HEAD CANNOT BE SEEN ON ANY SPEAR,
TELL ME HOW CAN I CAN SEE YOU,
WHERE ARE YOU MY GHAZI (ABBAS)?
Mere Ghazi Kahan Ho - Where are you my Abbas

urdu transliteration text:
Laaj Rakhlo Bahan Ki Baradar Mere
Khaak Maqtal Mere Sar Ka Parda Bane,
Hukm Dedo Zara, Muntazir Hai Hawa,
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
PLEASE SAVE THE DIGNITY OF YOUR SISTER,
PUT THE SAND OF THE MAQTAL ON MY HEAD AS A VEIL,
THE WIND IS WAITING FOR YOUR ORDER,
WHERE ARE YOU MY GHAZI (ABBAS)?
Mere Ghazi Kahan Ho - Where are you my Abbas

urdu transliteration text:
Tere Bazu Mujhe Raste Me Mile,
Mene Chadar Samaj Kar Wo Sar Par Rakhe
Bazuwo Se Tera, Puchhti Hu Pata,
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I FOUND YOUR SEVERED ARMS ON THE PLAINS OF KARBALA,
I TOOK THAT AS MY VEIL AND PLACED THEM ON MY HEAD,
I AM ASKING YOUR ARMS TO TELL ME YOUR WHEREABOUTS,
WHERE ARE YOU MY GHAZI (ABBAS)?
Mere Ghazi Kahan Ho - Where are you my Abbas

urdu transliteration text:
Dekh Kar Behn Ko Dasht Me Nange Sar,
Kya Haya Agayi, Chhup Gaye Ho Kidhar,
Khud Chali Awungi, Tum Bataado Zara
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
SEEING YOUR SISTER IN THE DESERT UNVEILED,
WHERE ARE YOU HIDING O MY BROTHER,
I WILL COME MYSELF IF ONLY YOU WOULD TELL ME,
WHERE ARE YOU MY ABBAS?
Mere Ghazi Kahan Ho - Where are you my Abbas

urdu transliteration text:
Mene Bachpan Me Lori Sunayi Tujhe,
Mene Chalna Sikhaya Tha Bhayi Tujhe
Raah Pur Khaar Par, Mujhko Chalna Sikha
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I USED TO SING A LULLABY TO YOU IN YOUR CHILDHOOD,
I EVEN TAUGHT YOU HOW TO WALK,
ON THIS ROUGH ROAD NOW YOU TEACH ME HOW TO WALK,
WHERE ARE YOU MY GHAZI (ABBAS)?
Mere Ghazi Kahan Ho - Where are you my Abbas

urdu transliteration text:
Wo Teri Laadli Wo Sakina Teri
Chalte Naaqe Se Jab Khaak Par Ghir Gayi
Dekhti Rehgayi, Wo Suwe Alqama
SAKINA WAS YOUR BELOVED LITTLE GIRL,
SHE KEPT ON LOOKING TOWARDS ALQAMA,
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
FROM CAMEL WHEN SHE FELL TO THE GROUND,
WHERE ARE YOU MY GHAZI (ABBAS)?
Mere Ghazi Kahan Ho - Where are you my Abbas

urdu transliteration text:
Jo Bane Murtaza Me Wo Ehsas Hun
Berida Bibiyon Ki Me Abbas Hun
Tum Meri Aas The, Ay Mere Bawafa
I BECAME LIKE MURTAZA WHEN NEEDED,
FOR THE WOMEN WITHOUT VEIL, I BECAME ABBAS,
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
YOU WERE MY HOPE O MY LOYAL ONE,
WHERE ARE YOU MY GHAZI (ABBAS)?
Mere Ghazi Kahan Ho - Where are you my Abbas

urdu transliteration text:
Waris-e-ambiya Ki Me Hamsheer Hun
Ehle Haider Hun Quran Ki Tafseer Hun
Koi "Yawar" Nahi, Kisko Du Me Sadaa
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I AM THE SISTER OF THE INHERITOR OF THE PROPHET,
I AM FROM HAIDAR AND THE INTERPRETATION OF QUR’AAN,
THERE IS NO HELPER, WHO SHOULD I CALL OUT FOR,
WHERE ARE YOU MY GHAZI (ABBAS)?
Mere Ghazi Kahan Ho - Where are you my Abbas
